checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 063 adds the specified planning-only runtime surface: a prepare-runtime-launch CLI command, runtime launch artifact, validator, tests, docs, final report, and audit evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AC-133 through AC-143 are represented by the command, artifact schema, runtime validator, standard validation profile, smoke script, CLI positive test, negative tests, documentation, repository memory, and planning-only execution policy.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation stays inside the issue 063 scope manifest and does not launch Claude Code, launch Antigravity, execute generated commands, call GitHub from the new command, install dependencies, touch secrets, change production configuration, or deploy.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command rejects unapproved runtime tools, requires Read and Write for the planned invocation, enforces a budget ceiling, records false execution policy booleans, and leaves protected files, auth, authorization, billing, database, CI/CD security, and production areas untouched.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in the final report and covered by the issue 063 scope manifest. The untracked local .agents and .claude/settings.local.json paths remain outside the staged task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Runtime launch validation, CLI tests, negative validation tests, contract validation, scope validation, standard validation, smoke validation, security gate, review gate, and git diff check passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local CI-equivalent SpecBridge validation passed. GitHub PR CI remains a required external merge gate and must pass before automatic merge.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the planning-only runtime boundary, changed files, local validation results, pending PR CI, no deployment, and the remaining need for a future runtime result recorder.

findings.evidence: The launch artifact records command shape and executor constraints but explicitly marks all execution policy fields false.
findings.recommendation: Use a later dedicated contract for controlled runtime result recording before treating a prepared launch as executed evidence.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
Runtime launch plans do not prove execution; runtime result recording remains a future contract.
